testcase.name: test_create_pointage_with_tours

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected total_distance ~35.5, got 0.0 assert 35.5 < 0.1 + where 35.5 = abs((0.0 - 35.5))

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chauffeur_portal_tours.py:111: in test_create_pointage_with_tours assert abs(data["total_distance"] - expected_distance) < 0.1, f"Expected total_distance ~{expected_distance}, got {data['total_distance']}" E AssertionError: Expected total_distance ~35.5, got 0.0 E assert 35.5 < 0.1 E + where 35.5 = abs((0.0 - 35.5))

testcase.name: test_pointage_tours_structure

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert (0.0 == 25.0 or 0.0 == 25.0 ± 2.5 + where 0.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d3b62f0880>('total_distance') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d3b62f0880> = {'avec_gasoil': True, 'chantier_id': '57334f17-d8cb-49ee-b410-4998b7f1cab5', 'chantier_reference': 'CH-2024-TEST', 'chauffeur_id': 'de440edd-342d-424e-afb5-e90a85af416b', ...}.get
comparison failed Obtained: 0.0 Expected: 25.0 ± 2.5)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chauffeur_portal_tours.py:146: in test_pointage_tours_structure assert data.get("total_distance") == 25.0 or data.get("total_distance") == pytest.approx(25.0, 0.1) E AssertionError: assert (0.0 == 25.0 or 0.0 == 25.0 ± 2.5 E + where 0.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d3b62f0880>('total_distance') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf9d3b62f0880> = {'avec_gasoil': True, 'chantier_id': '57334f17-d8cb-49ee-b410-4998b7f1cab5', 'chantier_reference': 'CH-2024-TEST', 'chauffeur_id': 'de440edd-342d-424e-afb5-e90a85af416b', ...}.get E E comparison failed E Obtained: 0.0 E Expected: 25.0 ± 2.5)

testcase.name: test_cleanup_test_data
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chauffeur_portal_tours.py:407: in test_cleanup_test_data if f.get("notes", "").startswith("TEST_"): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith'
